results.title: Sand’s first Iowa general election ad criticizes Lahn’s dual residency
results.description: The first ad of the general election in Iowa’s gubernatorial campaign, from Democrat Rob Sand, criticizes Republican candidate Zach Lahn for keeping his family’s home in Kansas while campaigning in Iowa.

results.title: Davenport defends against 'frivolous' open meeting lawsuits; requests sanctions
results.description: Davenport council members issued a response to two open meetings lawsuits this week defending the city's presentations and calling the lawsuits "frivolous and meant to intimidate and harass the Council."
